description: CompositionBlue and black striped  polo t-shirt from fila made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed spread collar, half buttoned placket, and branding printed on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash with warm water of 40 degreesWash inside out with like coloursDo not bleach or iron on printDry in shadeThis classic polo t-shirt from spykar showcases the label's versatility with its flattering cut and innovative design. Wear this to off-duty events to look your casual best. Team it with form fitting corduroy trousers and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
